title: Wooden Wire Brush Set – Heavy Duty 4 Row Steel Brush with Wooden Handle and Metal Scraper, Steel Wire Brush for Rust Removal and Abrasive Cleaning (Set of 3 Wire Brushes)
features: General Purpose Wooden Handle Metal Brush – These wire brushes for cleaning are suitable for surfaces that need coarse scrubbing and polishing. It offers versatility for general purpose use. The pack of 3 wire brushes for cleaning rust, surface preparation and corrosion, welding swarf and paint removal can also be used as a bbq wire brush for grill, wire brush for brickwork, wirebrush for steel parts of machinery and other surfaces’ heavy cleaning tasks.

Steel Wire Brush with Durable and Hard Bristles – With 4 rows of heavy-duty carbon steel bristles, this rust cleaner stiff brush will surely last through the tough jobs. It has an integrated design and is finely manufactured to come up with a secured binding so the wire bristles won’t easily fall off from the small wire brush head.

Wooden Handled Wire Brush – Unlike other steel brushes with a plastic body, the 29cm long handled wire brush is made from natural and sustainable materials. The hard-wearing wooden body is smoothly finished and properly curved for a comfortable grip. Get this environment-friendly scrubbing tool while providing a thorough cleaning to remove heavy accumulations of dirt and rust.
Comes with a Metal Scraper – These 3 steel brushes for cleaning have a 5cm metal scraper that is attached directly to the wire brush head to easily scrape stubborn debris.

Stiff Wire Brush for Abrasive Cleaning – This metal brush for cleaning rust will support you to clean extreme dirt. It is easy to maneuver and a handy tool for heavy grime scrubbing for both domestic and professional abrasive cleaning. Our wire brush for paint removal will reduce your efforts in scraping, removing rust, and dragging debris.
